subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Remey et al, spoken on 1914-10-18
subcodes.first_line: Truly I say I am well satisfied with both of you... There are many heralds in this world. Here is a herald who summons the people to the love and defense of his country
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @call to action
